title: Business-university research collaborations: Dowling review - final report
body: "This independent review by Professor Dame Ann Dowling was announced as part of the government’s science and innovation strategy in December 2014.  The review makes recommendations on how government can:   support relationships between UK businesses and the UK’s world-leading university researchers by reducing complexity foster and support relationships between researchers and business, particularly for smaller firms looking to innovate   Read the government’s response.  "
